name: Liqueurs from Extracts
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose a commercially made flavoring extract from the list below or similar alternatives available on the market.
2. Add one cup of sugar syrup or honey to the small bottle of extract in a 1 quart jar.
3. Fill the jar with vodka or brandy and shake well until combined.
1. Select an extract such as Galliano (Yellow Genepy), Benedictine (Reverendine), Green Chartreuse (Green Convent), Yellow Chartreuse (Yellow Convent), Strega (Stress), Curacao (Orange Red Curacao), Drambuie (Honey Smoke), Goldwasser (Dantzick), or Tia Maria (Moka).
2. Mix one cup of sugar syrup or honey with the extract in a 1 quart jar.
3. Top off the jar with vodka or brandy and shake thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
